name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript
notes:
This Building Block detects modification or creation of UserInitMprLogonScript

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tom Ueltschi (@c_APT_ure), Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: Logon Scripts (UserInitMprLogonScript)
SIGMA Description: Detects creation or execution of UserInitMprLogonScript persistence method


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of userinit.exe
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [explorer.exe or proquota.exe]
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [netlogon*.bat or UsrLogon.cmd or C:\WINDOWS\Explorer.EXE], Process Name (custom) contains any of \Citrix\System32\icast.exe
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of UserInitMprLogonScript
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of userinit.exe
AND NOT when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [explorer.exe or proquota.exe]
AND NOT when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [netlogon*.bat or UsrLogon.cmd or C:\WINDOWS\Explorer.EXE], Process Name (custom) contains any of \Citrix\System32\icast.exe
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of UserInitMprLogonScript
